top_signals.title: Police raid malware network tied to Russia's Evil Corp hacker group
top_signals.summary: An international operation targeted the SocGholish botnet, which has been linked to the Russia-based cybercrime group Evil Corp.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fogo de Chao nominated for Best Casual Dining Toast award
top_signals.summary: We have launched the Toast the City awards 2026 and throughout the year we’ll be speaking to some of our nominees – this week it’s Brazilian restaurant Fogo de Chao at Bishopsgate. top_signals.title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS – SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
top_signals.summary: On the Dry Bulk side, activity has remained notably strong, more than a handful transactions were concluded this week across a broad range of segments, from Handysize up to Post-Panamaxes. Buyers’ appetite remains healthy, underpinning a consistently active dry sale and purchase market. On the Tanker side, activity has been comparatively more selective, in line ...
